_doctrine: Brain forward-prediction record. DIRECTION = did up/down/hold call match the 24h score move (2pt noise band). TRANSITION = when a rung CHANGE was predicted, did that exact rung get reached (harder, graded separately). Misses carry an autopsy naming which live signal misled. This hit rate rides into the trading packets so Jordan reasons against the brains' actual forward track record.

open.reasoning: The strong historical analog and stealth accumulation signals suggest the cycle is climbing from Complacency toward Hope as sidelined capital re-enters, but mixed funding and ETF flow divergences temper the conviction.
open.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 35 while BTC holds $62k and funding stays below 0.015%
open.invalidated_if: BTC breaks below $58k with fear_greed dropping under 20 and VIX spiking above 25

open.reasoning: The 79.1% match to the August 2024 accumulation bottom, combined with expanding stablecoin reserves and institutional ETF flows, supports a ladder climb from Complacency into Hope as the path of least resistance.
